description: An automated system has misidentified a secondary seismic phase for the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake. The arrival at station GE.TOLI is currently labeled as a standard 'P' wave, but analysis indicates it is a 'PP' phase. Correct the phase type for station GE.TOLI from 'P' to 'PP' for the Noto Peninsula earthquake event and commit the updated solution to the database.
